_comment: PLACEHOLDER (A6/C2). The bundled ap-web build SHA/version is load-bearing: the bundled UI version IS this artifact's behavior. To be populated when ap-web is bundled in A6. The embed leaves React/ReactDOM/react-router(-dom) as BARE externals (per .omc/autopilot/A6a-embed-contract-gate.md): the VS Code webview bootstrap MUST supply React 18 + react-router-dom 6.4.x and a Router around OmnigentApp. Pin those versions here alongside the ap-web build SHA.
